description_long: This jewelry piece features a circular gold setting that elegantly frames a single, prominent round gemstone at its center. The gemstone, likely a diamond or a clear crystal, is held in place by two small prongs or connectors on either side, giving it a floating appearance within the gold ring. The gold band is smooth and polished, providing a high-gloss finish that contrasts with the faceted, sparkling surface of the central stone. The overall design is compact and symmetrical, with a minimalist yet luxurious aesthetic. The back and side views reveal the thinness of the setting, emphasizing the prominence of the gemstone. This piece is likely intended as a pendant or a small brooch, suitable for daily wear or special occasions.
description: A polished gold circular setting frames a single round, faceted gemstone, creating a minimalist and elegant jewelry piece.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full circular gold frame and the central gemstone, highlighting its symmetrical and floating design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the gold setting and the gemstone, emphasizing its delicate construction.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displays the back of the gold frame and the gemstone, showing the prong connectors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness of the piece and the gemstone's central placement.
